last_item: Band D (Alerts): Alerts → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/Alerts.tsx. Channel cards (.channel-grid/.channel-card/.channel-head custom divs) → shadcn Card composition (CardHeader+CardTitle+CardDescription+CardAction badge / CardFooter Edit+Send-test Buttons); grid → grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2. Rules table .data-table → Table family; Enable/Disable button → shadcn Switch (backlog's 'Switch to enable') with aria-label, calling unchanged toggleRule; Edit→outline sm, Delete (.btn-danger-ghost)→ghost sm+text-destructive; .row-disabled→cn(!enabled && 'opacity-60'). ChannelModal+RuleModal forms → Field/FieldLabel/Input/FieldDescription; native selects (metric/op/severity)→shadcn Select; Enabled checkbox→Field orientation=horizontal+Checkbox; .btn*→Button; field rows→responsive grid. .muted/.mono small→Tailwind tokens. Severity/State badges already on shared Badge. Dead Alerts-only CSS removed (.channel-grid/.channel-card/.channel-head/.channel-card p/.btn-danger-ghost/.row-disabled); kept shared .btn-row (Settings/Pooler), .data-table/.field*/.checkbox (band E).
_prev_item: Band D (Migrate): Migrate → shadcn. Rebuilt src/views/Migrate.tsx. Mode selector (.mode-tabs/ModeTab custom buttons) → shadcn Tabs/TabsList/TabsTrigger/TabsContent — FIRST Tabs use in the app; TabsContent preserves the old `{mode===...}` unmount-on-switch (per-mode form state still resets). Receive/Send (.segmented/.seg) → a nested Tabs in SessionPanel. SourceFields <fieldset> → FieldSet/FieldLegend/FieldGroup/Field/FieldLabel/FieldDescription+Input (two-input .field-rows → responsive grid sm:grid-cols-[2fr_1fr] / sm:grid-cols-2; ids static — only one SourceFields mounts at a time under Tabs). All forms: .field/.checkbox/.inline-form → Field/Checkbox + flex flex-col gap-5; overwrite checkboxes → Field orientation=horizontal+Checkbox; typed-confirm inputs (target name / OVERWRITE) → Field+Input+FieldError on mismatch + aria-describedby (gate logic unchanged). .btn* → Button (submit=default self-start; Start-another=outline sm; session Cancel=ghost sm + text-destructive; modal footers outline/destructive; busy composes the raw Spinner via data-icon). History + verification-diff .data-table → Table family. .session-code-block/.session-code → Tailwind tokens (bg-muted, font-mono text-4xl tracking-[0.18em] text-primary); progress stepper (.progress-step/.step-*, NO shadcn equivalent) kept as custom markup but rebuilt on semantic tokens via cn() (done=border-success, active=bg-primary/10, failed=border-destructive, pending=opacity-60; dropped the decorative pulse keyframe). .muted/.small/.job-running → text-muted-foreground/text-sm/flex flex-col. Dead Migrate-only CSS removed (.mode-tab*/.session-code*/.progress-steps/.progress-step/.step-*/.source-fields/.segmented/.seg/.job-running/.inline-form/@keyframes pulse); kept shared .field-row/.field-narrow/.field-help/.checkbox/.data-table (Alerts/Settings/Pooler/etc still use them — band E).
last_result: green: typecheck, 121 web tests (+5), build, go build (outside sandbox; snap-confine cap_dac_override blocks go in-sandbox). ui-heuristics-reviewer: applied only finding #2 (purely-additive aria-labelledby wiring the 3 Select triggers to their FieldLabel ids — Radix doesn't auto-wire it); declined #1 (sr-only span redundant with the Switch aria-label; state already visible via switch position + State badge; Switch was backlog-mandated), #3 (matches accepted Migrate Field orientation=horizontal checkbox pattern), #4 (title byte-identical to pre-migration + disabled buttons aren't focusable), #5 (self-flagged behavior change). Next in band D: Settings. Still deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft; prune next-themes dep. _prev_result: green: typecheck, 116 web tests (+2), build, go build. ui-heuristics-reviewer: ALL findings were pre-existing (verified against the old markup), so the behavior-parity rule applied — declined the behavior/copy changes (error inside the overwrite modal, uppercase-on-change for the session code, 'dumped'→'dump', terminal card title; all identical to pre-migration). Applied only 2 purely-additive a11y wins that change neither behavior nor visuals: aria-label on the mismatch Table + an sr-only aria-live status for the session stepper (gated to non-terminal so it doesn't double-announce the failed/expired Callouts). Added a 'Migrate mode tabs' test describe (default form renders + tab switch swaps the mounted form; Radix Tabs activates on mousedown button 0, not synthetic click). Next in band D: Alerts. Still deferred to band E: --info-soft collides with --primary-soft; prune next-themes dep.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
